Unclaimed tokens remain         in the contract and can be recovered via `recoverTokens`."},"newSprint(bytes32,address,uint128,uint32,uint32)":{"notice":"Create a new sprint and deposit the stream capacity."},"recoverTokens(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Recover tokens not consumed by streams (e.g. after sprint closes)."}},"notice":"Converts Wave contributor points into proportional Drips streams. Flow:  1. Manager calls `newSprint` with a Merkle root of (address \u2192 points),     the total points, the ERC-20 token, total capacity, and stream duration.  2. Each contributor calls `claim` with their Merkle proof.     The contract sets a Drips stream from its own account to the contributor's     address-based account ID at a rate proportional to their share of points. Stream rate formula:   amtPerSec (scaled) = (userPoints \u00d7 totalCapacity \u00d7 AMT_PER_SEC_MULTIPLIER)                        / (totalPoints \u00d7 streamDuration)","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/WaveConverter.sol":"WaveConverter"},"evmVersion":"osaka","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"lib/forge-std/src/interfaces/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x5945813ecc305238ca86d7a211a52f300e41173e34d39166f99758a857717dec","license":"MIT OR Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://2ace7b2e42fa6f84f660987cc3020d1494ba0fe4d558b4a64ab875d15a177f17","dweb:/ipfs/QmYR74diY5XWmkmmzCnboAYzeU9HtPun6qXVTUF51AspxN"]},"src/WaveConverter.sol":{"keccak256":"0x91846539a832548ff5a2d1134d4f4746cfeb1130a3ab3c682053edc49f6cde29","license":"GPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://7bc26310c1148e06b84c66668cb50c0150b735c13d28612bde29162d9e99330e","dweb:/ipfs/QmYS2CKsWCkXD4h4Ghb4RgZnnmYoXeyMUZY8gwALJfGBGJ"]},"src/lib/MerkleProof.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf6af7ed9d0f92c2d1146a1fc5e072578b0b98ff5f014dc891bc37636a3111c5a","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://463a493e9cbac014f793e20c047ad0bde753ec6d88bb932680d97edd33e7ee4c","dweb:/ipfs/QmPyXgHqXbmQngqSpkJAEMvhFp9NWEjX3c64Ncnq3CkVG5"]}},"version":1}

params.merkleRoot_: Root of the Merkle tree: leaves are keccak256(abi.encodePacked(addr, points)).
params.streamDuration_: How long (seconds) each contributor's stream runs.
params.totalCapacity_: Total tokens to distribute across all contributors.
params.totalPoints_: Sum of all contributor points (used for rate calculation).

claim(uint256,bytes32[],uint32).notice: Claim a Drips stream proportional to your points.

closeSprint(uint256).notice: Close a sprint (prevents further claims). Unclaimed tokens remain         in the contract and can be recovered via `recoverTokens`.

newSprint(bytes32,address,uint128,uint32.notice: Create a new sprint and deposit the stream capacity.

recoverTokens(address,uint256).notice: Recover tokens not consumed by streams (e.g. after sprint closes).
